title.en: Neon Arboretum: Pulse of the Virtual Forest

description.ko: 유기적 생명체와 디지털 건축의 초현실적 합성으로, 합성 오로라 아래 광섬유 네트워크와 떠다니는 데이터 입자가 통합된 생물 발광 나무를 특징으로 합니다.
description.en: A surreal synthesis of organic life and digital architecture, featuring bioluminescent trees integrated with fiber-optic networks and floating data particles under a synthetic aurora.

prompt: A cinematic high-detail shot of a digital nature landscape, FLORA-9 style, glowing translucent crystal flowers with circuit board patterns on petals, fiber optic vines pulsating with blue light, neon-lit moss, ethereal atmosphere, 8k resolution, photorealistic rendering, cybernetic forest aesthetic.
